calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Sep-04-2020 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER NORTHERN CALIFORNIA DISTRICT COUNCIL OF LABORERS' Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

Northern California District Council of Laborers' unopposed petition to confirm arbitration award is granted.

Order and Judgment are signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
